title: Expected an interface scope name to have at least one dot

features.name: interface instantiation with empty port list
features.description: Code should include an interface instantiation with an empty port list using empty parentheses, which triggers an internal error in trace declaration generation
features.snippet:
interface jtag_master; endinterface
module top; jtag_master jtag (); endmodule

features.name: interface instantiation without hierarchical path
features.description: Code should include an interface instantiation in a module without a hierarchical path, causing Verilator to generate an invalid dynamic scope name without dots
features.snippet:
interface jtag_if; endinterface
module top; jtag_if jtag (); endmodule
